description: Offline-first DataByteSprites source-file index for the active Phase 3 Product App runtime, data indexes, compatibility layers, legacy references, patch-layer risks, and future rebuild targets.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Game Data Manifest
sourceFiles.description: Shared game-data manifest consumed by the Studio bridge, Encounter Runtime, Capture Runtime, and Product App v3.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Species Index
sourceFiles.description: Studio species index used by the Studio data bridge.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Move Index
sourceFiles.description: Studio move index used by battle runtime systems.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Type Chart
sourceFiles.description: Studio type chart used by the Phase 2.4/3 battle runtime.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Ability Index
sourceFiles.description: Studio ability index reserved for a future ability runtime.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app-v3.js
sourceFiles.description: Functional Phase 3 Product App. Orchestrates the UI and calls Encounter Runtime, Capture Runtime, Gameplay Rules, and Battle Engine helpers.

sourceFiles.name: dd-capture-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Phase 3 split-module owner for capture odds, caps, attempts, failed-capture bonuses, and Signal Boost capture effects.

sourceFiles.name: dd-encounter-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Phase 3 split-module owner for encounter generation, rarity pools, signal initialization, and encounter tuning.

sourceFiles.name: dd-gameplay-rules-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Shared gameplay rules layer for capture caps, capture odds, signal stability, and move tuning.

sourceFiles.name: dd-canon-roster.js
sourceFiles.description: Current public 52-sprite roster bridge consumed by Data Discovery and DataByteDex.

sourceFiles.name: dd-studio-data-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Loads the shared game-data manifest, overlays Studio species metadata onto the public roster, and exposes move/type data to the runtime.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-engine-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Battle helper owner for type-effectiveness utilities, smarter enemy move choice, battle events, damage popups, sound hooks, and recovery helpers.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-balance-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Balance layer that defers to Gameplay Rules when available and normalizes the roster before Product App boot.

sourceFiles.name: databytedex-shared-renderer.js
sourceFiles.description: Current DataByteDex renderer that consumes DD_CANON_ROSTER and progress from Data Discovery local storage.

sourceFiles.name: dd-health-signal-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Compatibility display bridge for health and signal telemetry.

sourceFiles.name: dd-scan-bg.js
sourceFiles.description: Scanner background and visual effect layer.

sourceFiles.name: studio-runtime-bridge-checks.js
sourceFiles.description: Runtime health checker aligned to the Product App chain and DD_* globals.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Phase 2 Product App. Replaced as live page owner by Product App v3.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-standalone-app.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Scanner OS runtime owner. Retained for behavior recovery and comparison only.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-os-v2.js
sourceFiles.description: Former rebuilt Scanner OS battle owner.

ownershipRules: New gameplay logic belongs in Phase 3 runtime owners before Product App UI orchestration.
Compatibility layers may render UI/effects but should not own gameplay state.
Legacy references are retained for behavior recovery only and should not be loaded by databyte-discovery.html.
Retire-candidate files require verification before deletion.
